name: Glory Star New Media Group Holdings Limited
summary: Glory Star New Media Group Holdings Limited provides advertisement and content production services in China. The company also engages in the mobile and online advertising, digital media, and entertainment businesses. In addition, it offers CHEERS app, an e-commerce platform, which provides online store, live streaming, and online games, as well as online short videos, variety shows, and dramas. Glory Star New Media Group Holdings Limited was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
